REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: THE ANSWER OF ROBERT E SHELTON WAS STRICKEN FOR NON PAYMENT OF FEES. THERE ARE NO OTHER FILINGS TO STRIKE.
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROBERT SHELTON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. ROBERT SHELTON HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
